summary: ITERATION 3 — ProfitEngine v5 post-mirror expansion: 7-agent mesh, 18 dashboard pages, 27 backend endpoints. Backend pytest 41/41 PASS (health, 7 agents incl. sovereign-v1 orchestrator, execute 200/404, sovereign status+4 decisions, 5 approvals + approve/veto/400/404, advisor 200/400, revenue streams/stats, ledger goal=25000, 12 ops endpoints, stats with sovereign_decisions_today+proof_of_work_score, code merger weak→strong upgrade & 400 syntax). CLI code_merger 15/15 PASS. Frontend (https://025a3339-5a34-4294-94ea-14efe2cd36f6.preview.emergentagent.com): Landing renders 7-AGENT MESH hero badge + 7 agent cards (including Sovereign) + Pricing/Roadmap/FAQ/Waitlist (Playground section text not found but engine playground present under different label). Dashboard: ALL 18 sidebar testids present (sidebar-overview … sidebar-secrets), cycle-pill OK, sov-status-pill OK, 5 KPI tiles, Sovereign decision card with .sov-card indigo glow, 4 approvals queue items, revenue area chart, 7 agents on /dashboard/agents (agent-sovereign-v1 carries sov-card class). Integration flows VERIFIED end-to-end: approval-approve-apr_001 → approval-decision-apr_001 = 'approved'; advisor-input + advisor-submit → advisor-msg-0 renders sovereign answer; revenue-range-7d/14d/30d/90d all clickable; agent execute button fires backend (toast: 'Sovereign run queued. run_id b48a3322'). /dashboard/sovereign has all 4 KPIs (sov-tokens, sov-spend, sov-breaker, sov-decisions) + 4 sov-decision-* rows. content-table = 7 rows; books = 3; deploy-* = 5; build-* = 5; proposal-* = 3; opp-* = 4; audit-* = 8; secret-* = 6; cost categories visible (10 cost-* + 5 rows); distillation routing for local/groq/gemini/claude rendered. NO console errors. NO functional bugs.

testid_mismatches_vs_spec.actual: page renders content correctly but no data-testid attributes starting with 'pow-' or matching 'pow-meter' found in DOM
uses execute-agent-{id} (reversed naming); functionally works — clicking fires POST /api/agents/{id}/execute and toast confirms run_id
only 1 element matches [data-testid^='analytics-']; tiles render but use different testid prefix; 2 charts present
no [data-testid^='distill-'] found; routing breakdown text (local/groq/gemini/claude) IS visible
'Playground' keyword not found on landing; engine merge UI present under different heading

action_items: (Optional, LOW) Align ProofOfWorkPage testids with spec: add data-testid='pow-meter' to the ring and data-testid='pow-{metric}' to each of the 6 metric tiles.
(Optional, LOW) Rename agent execute buttons from execute-agent-{id} → agent-execute-{id} OR update spec; functionality is identical.
(Optional, LOW) Add data-testid='analytics-{metric}' to the 4 metric tiles on /dashboard/analytics and 'analytics-chart-{idx}' to the 2 charts.
(Optional, LOW) Add data-testid='distill-{tier}' for local/groq/gemini/claude routing rows on /dashboard/distillation.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at 524 lines is approaching the 700-line threshold — consider splitting fixtures into a separate module (e.g., backend/fixtures.py) before adding more domain data.
All endpoints fixture-backed except /api/waitlist and /api/merge (Mongo) — fine for preview but a 'preview-mode' flag could prevent accidental production use.
/api/stats devs_joined adds +312 baseline to db count — intentional per product spec.
All 7 agents share identical schema shape; sovereign carries tier='sovereign' + type='orchestrator' which the frontend correctly uses to apply the .sov-card indigo glow class.
decide_approval and execute_agent return proper 400/404; advisor_ask correctly rejects empty/whitespace questions with 400.
Mongo _id is never returned (Pydantic response_model gates waitlist; merge_events not exposed via GET) — safe.
Frontend dashboard pages all gracefully handle the ~1s API latency — no loading spinners visible but no flash-of-zero either (cached on first render after route mount).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py (rewritten for full v5 surface — 41 tests covering 7-agent mesh, sovereign, approvals decide flows, advisor, all ops endpoints, stats, merger)

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional (all 18 dashboard pages load + render data; all critical integration flows work end-to-end); ~88% testid spec coverage

seed_data_creation: Test run inserted a small number of merge_events docs to MongoDB via POST /api/merge (deterministic, safe to drop).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_backend_api.py. Run via: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/test_backend_api.py code_merger/tests/ -v. BASE_URL is read from /app/frontend/.env (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). All dashboard data has ~1s render latency — always wait_for_timeout(1500) after navigation before asserting. Agent execute testid is execute-agent-{id} not agent-execute-{id}. ProofOfWork page renders correctly but lacks data-testid attributes — assert via visible text instead. Sovereign card class is 'sov-card' (indigo glow).
rca of the issue: No bugs found in iteration 3. The 5 testid_mismatches_vs_spec items are spec-vs-implementation naming differences only; all pages render correctly, all backend integrations fire, and end-to-end flows (approve, advisor ask, agent execute, revenue range switch) all work. Main agent should fix the 4 testid action_items if downstream automated test coverage is desired, but product behaviour is correct.
